name_cn:
Genuine leather, two-tone in stock!!️
Classic Lady Diana Bag, iconic letter charm, classic quilted, premium sheepskin, a must-have 3-compartment mini bag 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻. Crossbody or handheld, it exudes femininity. A classic fashion style. A beauty everyone on Instagram and fashion icons has. Don't miss out ❤️
size: 17*7*15cm
